name: fullstack-project
description: Projet fullstack : back-end (Node.js + Express) + front-end (React + Vite)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix back-end && npm install --prefix front-end
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "back,front" -c "blue,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix back-end" "npm run dev --prefix front-end"
scripts.dev:clean: lsof -ti:5001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev
